mapper.select: SELECT p.pid, p.title, p.is_public, p.total_submit, p.total_accept FROM problem p WHERE p.pid = #{pid} AND p.is_del = 0
SELECT p.id, p.pid, p.title, p.total_submit, p.total_accept, p.is_public, p.created_by_user_id, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.is_del FROM problem p WHERE p.pid = #{pid} LIMIT 1
SELECT t.tag_name FROM tag t JOIN problem_tag_rel ptr ON t.id = ptr.tag_id JOIN problem p ON ptr.problem_id = p.id WHERE p.pid = #{pid} AND p.is_del = 0 AND t.is_del=0 AND ptr.is_del=0
mapper.sql:
p.is_del = 0
AND p.is_public = 1
AND p.id IN ( SELECT ptr.problem_id FROM problem_tag_rel ptr WHERE ptr.tag_id IN
#{tagId}
AND ptr.is_del = 0 GROUP BY ptr.problem_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ptr.tag_id) = #{tagIdsSize} )
mapper.select:
SELECT u.pid, u.title, u.total_submit, u.total_accept, MAX(u.score) AS score FROM (
UNION ALL SELECT , MATCH(p.title) AGAINST (#{title} IN BOOLEAN MODE) AS score FROM problem p
AND ( MATCH(p.title) AGAINST (#{title} IN BOOLEAN MODE) OR p.pid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{titleLike}, '%') )
UNION ALL SELECT , 0.1 AS score FROM problem p
AND (
p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tok}, '%') OR p.pid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tok}, '%')
)
UNION ALL SELECT , 0.1 AS score FROM problem p
AND ( p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{titleLike}, '%') OR p.pid LIKE CONCAT('%', #{titleLike}, '%') )
UNION ALL SELECT , 0.0 AS score FROM problem p
) u GROUP BY u.pid, u.title, u.total_submit, u.total_accept ORDER BY score DESC, CASE WHEN u.pid REGEXP '^[A-Za-z][0-9]+$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(u.pid, 2) AS UNSIGNED) ELSE 18446744073709551615 END ASC, u.pid ASC
SELECT COALESCE( MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(p.pid, 2) AS UNSIGNED)), 0 ) + 1 FROM problem p WHERE p.pid REGEXP '^P[0-9]{4}$'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM submission s WHERE s.problem_id = #{problemId} AND s.is_del = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM contest_problem_rel cpr INNER JOIN contest c ON cpr.contest_id = c.id WHERE cpr.problem_id = #{problemId} AND cpr.is_del = 0 AND c.is_del = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM problem_set_problem_rel pspr INNER JOIN problem_set ps ON pspr.problem_set_id = ps.id WHERE pspr.problem_id = #{problemId} AND pspr.is_del = 0 AND ps.is_del = 0
SELECT rel.sort_order FROM contest_problem_rel rel WHERE rel.contest_id = #{contestId} AND rel.problem_id = #{problemId} AND rel.is_del = 0
SELECT rel.sort_order FROM problem_set_problem_rel rel WHERE rel.problem_set_id = #{problemSetId} AND rel.problem_id = #{problemId} AND rel.is_del = 0
SELECT rel.sort_order FROM assignment_problem_rel rel WHERE rel.assignment_id = #{assignmentId} AND rel.problem_id = #{problemId} AND rel.is_del = 0

SELECT prev_pid, next_pid FROM ( SELECT p.pid, LAG(p.pid) OVER w AS prev_pid, LEAD(p.pid) OVER w AS next_pid FROM problem p WHERE p.is_del = 0 AND p.is_public = 1 WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY CASE WHEN p.pid REGEXP '^[A-Za-z][0-9]+$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(p.pid, 2) AS UNSIGNED) ELSE 18446744073709551615 END, p.pid) ) t WHERE t.pid = #{pid}

SELECT prev_pid, next_pid FROM ( SELECT p.pid, LAG(p.pid) OVER (ORDER BY rel.sort_order) AS prev_pid, LEAD(p.pid) OVER (ORDER BY rel.sort_order) AS next_pid FROM problem p JOIN contest_problem_rel rel ON p.id = rel.problem_id WHERE rel.contest_id = #{contestId} AND rel.is_del = 0 AND p.is_del = 0 ) t WHERE t.pid = #{pid}

SELECT prev_pid, next_pid FROM ( SELECT p.pid, LAG(p.pid) OVER (ORDER BY rel.sort_order) AS prev_pid, LEAD(p.pid) OVER (ORDER BY rel.sort_order) AS next_pid FROM problem p JOIN problem_set_problem_rel rel ON p.id = rel.problem_id WHERE rel.problem_set_id = #{problemSetId} AND rel.is_del = 0 AND p.is_del = 0 ) t WHERE t.pid = #{pid}

SELECT prev_pid, next_pid FROM ( SELECT p.pid, LAG(p.pid) OVER (ORDER BY rel.sort_order) AS prev_pid, LEAD(p.pid) OVER (ORDER BY rel.sort_order) AS next_pid FROM problem p JOIN assignment_problem_rel rel ON p.id = rel.problem_id WHERE rel.assignment_id = #{assignmentId} AND rel.is_del = 0 AND p.is_del = 0 ) t WHERE t.pid = #{pid}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM contest_submission cs INNER JOIN contest c ON cs.contest_id = c.id INNER JOIN submission s ON cs.submission_id = s.id WHERE s.problem_id = #{problemId} AND cs.is_del = 0 AND c.is_del = 0 AND s.is_del = 0
